_comment: SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §4 -- the eng-review §5 v0 config batch, THE LEDGER HEADLINE ('config change = audited 3A event, rendered from registry'). Seeded now as real, typed, desk-editable rows -- every founder-ratified value from day one. Each key's pending_consumer_slice honestly names the BUILD.md §7 slice that actually reads it; today's ConfigSeedLoader ignores that extra JSON property (harmless, forward-compatible) until Pass C's dead-tunable-lint extension (PHASE_2A_SUBSTRATE.md §6) adds the matching ConfigManifestEntry.PendingConsumerSlice property and enforces it in CI -- this manifest's DATA does not wait on that CI wiring to land. Deliberately NOT seeded here, reasons recorded in SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §4: nakama_rep_floor (unratified unit), ε-budget-per-principal (defers to pre-G3.5b), annual Premium ("annual later"). core.con_day_cutoff is already S1-seeded in domain-core.config.json -- never duplicated here (union-merge, one truth).
